Anatta Nergui

← Collection

Schmutz

That layer of ingrained
Dust — grime —
That comes from touch
On your hands

Rubbed off
Washed away
Upon noticing

That is worn as jewels
Showcased, celebrated
Sought after

For the entirety
Of your life

That which
Comes upon you
Just from touch

Atmosphere
plain
Crux
equivalence
Words
43
Domain
money
Ground
lexical
Related poems
  • Collective Delusion
